message:
test(proptest): add property tests for soak confidence gate module (ft-e34d9.10.8.5)

Adds 408-line proptest suite covering the soak_confidence_gate module's
core decision-making logic with randomized inputs.

Coverage includes:
- Serde roundtrip stability for all gate domain types (JourneyCategory,
  WorkloadProfile, FailureInjectionProfile, ConfidenceDecision)
- SoakMatrix plan generation invariants: cell count equals the product
  of journey × workload × injection cardinalities
- CellResult counter arithmetic: pass/fail/skip tallies sum correctly
  under arbitrary execution sequences
- Confidence gate evaluation logic: gate produces Confident only when
  all required cells pass, ConditionallyConfident when failures exist
  but are within tolerance, NotConfident otherwise
- Standard factory invariants: default matrix and gate configurations
  produce well-formed initial states

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
